home.tagline: Apparel born in the streets. No rules. No limits.
home.strip1Desc: Greece, Cyprus & Bulgaria: 1–3 days. International: calculated at checkout.
home.strip2Desc: Every piece is built for the city. No compromises on material or construction.
home.strip3Desc: Reach us on Instagram @allcity_clothing or via email for any questions.

shipping.title:
Shipping &
Payment
shipping.shippingBody: All orders will be shipped via courier within 2 days after being confirmed.
shipping.note: * For any issues or questions regarding your order — before or after delivery — contact us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
shipping.returnsNote: * If your order arrives damaged or not as described, contact us immediately. We will cover all additional fees to ensure your order meets the required standards.
shipping.paymentBody: We accept all major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay — processed securely via Stripe.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.stripeNote: Secured by Stripe. We never store card data.
checkout.confirmedNote: Thank you for your order. We will ship within 2 business days. Check your email for confirmation.
